rulings.Case Title: WALSH VS PESKIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Orders (1)Compelling The Production Of Corporate Records, And (2)Compelling A Special Assessment On North Beach Condominium Association; Declarations Of Susan Walsh And Stephen Sayad
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO COMPEL CERTAIN CORPORATE RECORDS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: 1)PRODUCE ANY WAIVER OF CONFLICTS OF INTERESTS OR POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTERESTS BETWEEN REPRESENTATIVES OF BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION. 2)PRODUCE ALL BILLING STATEMENTS OR INFORMATION RECEIVED FROM INSURANCE AS TO FEES PAID IN LITIGATION. MATERIAL CAN BE REDACTED TO EXTENT THERE ARE SUBSTANTIVE COMMUNICATIONS BETWEEN CLIENT AND ATTORNEY CONTAINED HEREIN. MOTION TO REQUIRE SPECIAL ASSESSMENT DENIED PROVIDED HOMEOWNERS PROVIDE PROOF OF SUFFICIENT ASSETS TO PAY DAMAGES IF PLAINTIFF SUCCESSFUL. STATUS CONFERENCE TO BE HELD. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: CHUI MING CHU VS. GEE POY KUO ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Judgment On The Pleadings Or, In The Alternative, Partial Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. DEFAMATION CAUSE OF ACTION SURVIVES UNDER CCP SECTION 337.20. DOCTRINE OF "YOU CANNOT DEFAME A DEAD PERSON" DOES NOT APPLY. DENY MOTION FOR JUDGMENT BASED ON COMMUNICATIONS PRIVILEGE. COMPLAINT ALLEGES MALICE. GRANT MOTION FOR PARTIAL SUMMARY JUDGMENT UNDER CCP 337.34. STRIKE CLAIMS FOR DAMAGES RELATING TO PAIN AND SUFFERING. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: JACK COSTENBADER VS. JERSEY CONSTRUCTORS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion For Order Determining That Donald And Vivian Costenbader Are In Contempt Of Court For Willful Violation Of Court Order
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF MOTION TO HOLD DEFENDANTS DONALD AND VIVIAN COSTENBADER IN CONTEMPT DENIED - FILING OF MOTION FOR FURNISHMENT OF SECURITY UNDER CORPORATIONS CODE 800 SUPERSEDES OBLIGATION TO COMPLY WITH PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION ISSUED SEPTEMBER 9. IN ADDITION PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION ORDER DID NOT PROVIDE FOR BOND AS REQUIRED BY CCP 529 WHICH IS MANDATORY. (302/AJR/KS(EX))

rulings.Case Title: JACK COSTENBADER VS. JERSEY CONSTRUCTORS, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion For An Order Requiring Plaintiff To Furnish Security Pursuant To Corporation Code Section;
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO POST SECURITY DENIED CONDITIONS OF STATUTE NOT SATISFIED. DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR SECURITY ARE ALLEGEDLY INVOLVED SEE CORPORATIONS CODE 800(C)(2). MOTION TO DISSOLVE INJUNCTION OFF CALENDAR TO BE RENOTICED AFTER BOND POSTED FOR INJUNCTION. (302/AJR/KS(EX))
